The Coach

WHO AM I

I'm Miles — a dedicated personal trainer, semi-professional footballer, and proud father of two with a genuine passion for helping people become the best version of themselves.

For over 4 years, I've worked closely with clients from all backgrounds — helping more than 150 people improve their fitness, lifestyle, confidence, and daily habits through structured training and consistent support.

As both an athlete and family man, I understand the importance of balance, commitment, and long-term progress. My coaching goes beyond workouts — I focus on building sustainable routines, discipline, and a healthier mindset that fits into real life.

What We Offer

OUR SERVICES

🏋️
Personal Training
1-2-1 PT

Private one-to-one coaching sessions tailored entirely to your goals, ability, and lifestyle. The most personalised experience available.

  • Private coaching sessions
  • Bespoke programming
  • Technique correction
  • Progress tracking & accountability
  • Lifestyle & habit support
💻
Online Coaching
REMOTE

Full coaching support from anywhere in the world — includes a personalised training plan, nutrition plan, weekly check-ins, and constant support.

  • Custom training programme
  • Personalised nutrition plan (included)
  • Weekly check-ins
  • Progress tracking
  • Ongoing support & adjustments
🔥
Bootcamps
GROUP SESSIONS

High-energy group training sessions designed to push your limits, build community, and deliver real results in a motivating environment.

  • High-intensity group training
  • Community & accountability
  • Varied functional workouts
  • All fitness levels welcome
  • Expert coaching throughout
🏃
Run Club
CARDIO & COMMUNITY

Structured running sessions to build endurance, burn fat, and connect with like-minded people chasing the 1%.

  • Structured run sessions
  • All paces welcome
  • Endurance building
  • Community atmosphere
  • Expert-led guidance

Client Stories

WHAT THEY SAY

★★★★★

Miles is firm and kind — everything I needed in a personal trainer. He knows where to push me and how to get the best out of me. He helps me understand my bad habits and supports me to overcome them. Since working with Miles I've noticed real changes and developed sustainable habits to be the best me I can be. Plus I've found a new friend. If you're looking for a new you, I couldn't recommend anyone more. 10/10.

★
Verified Client
Transformation · 1:1 PT
★★★★★

It's true what they say — you can't love anyone until you love yourself. I have been with Miles for over 12 months and in that time I started to love me a bit more, which resulted in me finding the love of my life. Now I have a wedding to get in shape for! I feel healthier, stronger and more confident and I'll never regret taking that first step. Trust the process! Thank you so much Miles for your constant support.

★
Verified Client · 12 Months
Confidence & Transformation
★★★★★

The bootcamps are absolutely elite. The energy, the programming, the coaching — it's unlike anything I've done before. I'm fitter now than I was at 25. Highly, highly recommend Miles and The One % Society.

★
Verified Client
Fat Loss · Bootcamp
★★★★★

I came in with zero confidence in the gym and left every session feeling unstoppable. The 1-2-1 coaching is incredible value — my technique is solid and I'm hitting PBs I never imagined possible. Miles genuinely cares about your progress.
